## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and where does oxi get in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches providers, local models, tools, the
editor, or Git, mention which surface.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, references, mockups.
